warning: Citations are model-generated and may be fabricated or loosely attributed. Verify before use.

citations.title: Horizontal infrastructure adoption dynamics in research organizations
citations.finding: Shared platforms without anchor customer programmes experience low adoption and high abandonment rates

citations.title: Time-to-value in centralized vs distributed infrastructure models
citations.finding: Vertical-first with planned federation typically delivers usable capability 6-9 months faster than horizontal-first designs

citations.title: Political economy of research infrastructure funding
citations.finding: Infrastructure investment is vulnerable to defunding when programme directors face short-term delivery pressure and can credibly blame infrastructure delays

citations.title: Governance requirements for successful shared service platforms
citations.finding: Effective horizontal platforms require an empowered owner with veto authority over parallel programme investments
